product_surfaces: internal/mcp MCP tool registry schemas for read tools
internal/mcp HTTP/SSE session and message path
internal/service cache-first read dispatch for cache_status, list_sources, get_source, sync_status, list_chunks, search_chunks, and search_sources
internal/cache and internal/search reads over sanitized issue/wiki live-shaped cache records
evidence_type: offline API/runtime tests through production MCP server transports and repository diff whitespace check

mocks_used: external dependencies only: live GitCode network sync is substituted with deterministic sanitized cached issue/wiki records because live validation is disabled
